data.name: Inugami: Doggy Dojo!
data.detailed_description:
Kazuma生於武林之家，從小在他父親嚴厲地監督和訓練下成長，希望有一天他能接下家傳的武道館。但是Kazuma並不想繼承祖業，他想創出自己的天地，於是他在一個夏天試圖逃跑。可是他還是被抓住並運到一個孤島上。當他醒來時，他找到他父親在一張紙條上的留言，叫他只有打敗島上的妖怪時才可歸家。

Kazuma在島上尋找地方庇護時，居然碰上他父親所說的妖怪。在這個像狗一樣的妖靈面前，Kazuma解釋他的情況。妖靈從狗身化為一位毛茸茸的獸女，並同意幫Kazuma離開孤島。這只妖靈原來是一隻犬神，名為Tomoe，而她願意教Kazuma她的狗拳，但Kazuma必須用他的“精氣”來維持Tomoe的朝氣。

看看Tomoe和Kazuma在孤島上從師徒關係變得越來越密切。 。 。

特點:
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 幾小時的內容。
  • 所有美女帶有日文語音。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。

Inugami: Doggy Dojo是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作。我們在cherry kiss櫻桃社試圖將日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.short_description: Kazuma生於武林之家，但是Kazuma並不想繼承祖業，而想為自己創業。他父親最終把他抓到一個孤島上與一隻犬神學習一套遺失了的武功——犬交式。

data.name: Inugami: Doggy Dojo!
data.detailed_description:
This tale about getting some tail follows the journey of a boy on the cusp of manhood thrust into the clutches of a sexy demon dog. Stranded on an island our hero Kazuma undergoes training in the secret art of doggy style and any other primal movements his new sexual sensei endows him with.

In exchange for studying UNDER Inugami (dog spirit) you have to satisfy her craving for “human essence”. Get her on all fours and feed that animalistic need to breed!

Inugami: Doggy Dojo is sweet stirring but also gets a little sticky by the end. If you are a fan of the Norn style visual novels you deserve to have this title in your library.


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Main female characters fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections

Inugami: Doggy Dojo is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.
